case_title: J.R. PETERS CO., INC. VS. EC AUTO BODY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF J.R. PETERS CO., INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EC AUTO BODY $1,477.76 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,552.76, DEFENDANT EC AUTO BODY NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
